title: Polymer Patch for (Red)Panda Plushie!
description: Adds an adorable plush red panda friend to your game!
body:
# Polymer Patch for (Red)Panda Plushie!

This is a patch for **[(Red)Panda Plushie!](https://modrinth.com/mod/panda-plushies)**, making it work fully server side, with all of its functionality intact.

(Red)Panda Plushie! is required and not included within this mod.

This mod requires server resource pack, about which setup you can read here: https://polymer.pb4.eu/latest/user/resource-pack-hosting/

You can read more about **[(Red)Panda Plushie! on it's Modrinth page!](https://modrinth.com/mod/panda-plushies)**
